body.value: ○鹿兒島藩
鹿児島藩 (かごしまはん)
Kagoshima domain (Satsuma). The ○ marker introduces a new domain entry — the page-attribution signal for the extraction pipeline.
○鹿兒島藩
草高 八拾六萬九千五百九十三石五斗七升六合六勺四才 (内 琉球國高引除)
草高 (くさだか) は八十六万九千五百九十三石五斗七升六合六勺四才。内訳に琉球国高は控除。
Sōdaka (gross-yield assessed kokudaka) = 869,593.5766 koku, EXCLUDING Ryūkyū tribute (琉球國高引除). The Ryūkyū Kingdom paid tribute to Satsuma but was not part of the formal Japanese kokudaka system.
草高
内 損高 七拾七萬五千三百六十三石五斗七升五合七勺
うち損高は七十七万五千三百六十三石
Of which sondaka (loss-adjusted high; the portion deducted for crop failures and other losses over the 5-year averaging window) = 775,363.5757 koku.
内 損高
内 高 七拾貳萬九千四百八十六石六斗九升四合八勺
高は七十二万九千四百八十六石

And 'high' (the remaining productive-yield) = 729,486.6948 koku. This is sōdaka 869,593 minus sondaka 775,363... wait, the math doesn't directly subtract — this is a separate omotedaka-tier figure, not sōdaka minus sondaka.
高
現石 貳萬六千百五十六石八斗貳合
現石 (げんせき) は二万六千百五十六石

Genseki (current rice on hand / actual rice tax collected) = 26,156.802 koku. The actual flow of rice to domain coffers — much smaller than the assessed kokudaka because of tax-rate fractions, exemptions, and losses.
現石
雜稅銭 五萬九千七百九十六貫三百七十二文
雑税銭 (ざつぜいせん) は五万九千七百九十六貫三百七十二文 — 銭貨単位

Zatsuzei sen (miscellaneous tax in copper coin) = 59,796.372 kan-mon. This row was corrected via the 2026-05-18 crop verification — the original chunk had a garbled OCR that mis-read 五十九貫九千 (a smaller number) for the actual 五萬九千七百九十六貫.
雑稅銭
砂糖 五百〇九萬二千八百二十五斤
砂糖 (さとう) 五百九万二千八百二十五斤 — 約3055トン

Sugar = 5,092,825 jin (~3,055 metric tons per year). Satsuma's famous Ryūkyū sugar monopoly. This is one of the most economically distinctive entries in the entire HI corpus — the southern domain's near-exclusive control over Ryūkyū-routed cane sugar trade was a major fiscal advantage.
5,092,825 jin (~3,055 metric tons)
砂糖
